case_title: DELMAR TANCHEZ VS. EXPERT PAINTING AND DRYWALL INC, A CA CORP ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANCHEZ, DELMAR AS TO DEFENDANT EXPERT PAINTING AND DRYWALL INC, A CA CORP TEIJEIRO, STEVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
